_meta.description: Maps every Skill-6 funnel template (38 total) to the Skill-44 automation templates that belong downstream of it. Each mapping is ADVISORY — a GUIDE, not a rule. Honor explicit user choices; never block a build.
_meta.flexibility_note: All links are recommended defaults. The Skill-44 matcher and the Skill-6 matcher both honor explicit user desire above any suggestion here. If the user says 'I want X', build X — do not substitute or block.

squeeze-page.rationale: Squeeze page opt-in is the canonical SOS trigger event. New subscribers get the 5-email Soap Opera bonding sequence immediately, then graduate to the daily Seinfeld broadcast. Post-opt-in multichannel stack extends reach across channels.

reverse-squeeze-page.rationale: Reverse squeeze gives value first, then captures the opt-in. Same SOS bonding sequence fires on opt-in. The indoctrination multichannel preframe reinforces the value bridge delivered before the opt-in.

lead-magnet.rationale: Lead magnet opt-in fires SOS. Behavioral retargeting fires for visitors who saw the magnet page but did not opt in, pulling them back.

hero.rationale: Hero funnels (homepage-style opt-in pages) need strong AC story indoctrination. Multichannel preframe extends the hero's story across email + Messenger + push.

bridge.rationale: Bridge pages pre-frame a third-party offer. Indoctrination preframe reinforces the bridge story before the subscriber hits the offer. SOS bonds the AC to the new lead.

application.rationale: Application funnels need qualification-aware nurture: homework → bond → booking → show-up. The application-homework-booking-nurture template is the primary driver. Attractive character intro runs in parallel to build trust before the call.

survey-quiz.rationale: Survey/quiz completions segment by answer — the indoctrination preframe can branch by segment. SOS and the general indoctrination sequence run for all completers.

ask-campaign.rationale: Ask campaigns collect market research before making an offer. SOS bonds the subscriber; indoctrination preframe tells the AC story while research is being analyzed.

homepage.rationale: Homepage funnel is a full website with opt-in capture. Behavioral retargeting fires for visitors who browsed but did not opt in. Opt-in triggers SOS.
homepage.entry_event: Homepage opt-in form submit or page visit (retargeting)

2-step-tripwire-free-plus-shipping.rationale: 2-step / free-plus-shipping funnels have a step-1-not-step-2 abandon problem. The free-plus-shipping-book-oto-followup handles post-purchase OTO follow-up. Abandoned cart multichannel recovery pulls back step-1 abandons. SOS bonds new buyers.

book-funnel.rationale: Book funnels are free-plus-shipping variants. The OTO followup sequence nurtures buyers toward the upsell. SOS runs for new subscribers from the book offer. Seinfeld daily broadcast is the ongoing relationship engine.

sales-letter.rationale: Sales letter funnels pair with a 3 Closes follow-up (Emotion → Logic → Fear). Scarcity deadline close fires near the cart-close event. New leads from the page get SOS.
sales-letter.entry_event: Sales page opt-in or cart entry

video-sales-letter-vsl.rationale: VSL funnels follow the Perfect Webinar story arc. The Perfect Webinar Stack Close post-video follow-up is the primary closer. SOS bonds new leads. 3 Closes provides the full Emotion/Logic/Fear cadence for non-buyers.

self-liquidating-offer-slo.rationale: SLO funnels monetize ad spend at break-even. Cart abandon recovery is critical — both the funnel-specific step-1-not-step-2 recovery and the multichannel abandoned-cart-recovery fire for non-buyers. SOS bonds new leads.

membership-continuity.rationale: Membership funnels live and die on stick rate. The membership stick + retention sequence is the primary automation — quick-win delivery in week 1, identity reinforcement, cancel-save checkpoint. Daily Seinfeld keeps members engaged.

daily-deal.rationale: Daily deal funnels run time-sensitive scarcity. Scarcity deadline close is the primary automation — fires at deal launch and accelerates at countdown. Cart open/close launch sequence governs the full deal window. Abandoned cart recovery captures non-buyers before close.
daily-deal.entry_event: Deal page visit / cart entry / deal expiry

storefront.rationale: Storefronts have high browse-abandon and cart-abandon rates. Abandoned cart recovery and behavioral retargeting are the primary revenue recovery tools. Seinfeld daily broadcast keeps buyers returning.
storefront.entry_event: Product page visit / cart add / cart abandon

webinar-funnel.rationale: Live webinar funnels need: registration confirmation, indoctrination, reminders (24h, 1h, 15min), and the post-webinar replay + close sequence. The webinar-registration-reminder-replay-stack covers all pre and post events. Perfect Webinar Stack Close handles the offer window.

autowebinar-funnel.rationale: AutoWebinar (evergreen) funnels need watch-duration segmentation — registrants who watched 80%+ get a direct buy nudge; 40-80% get a replay offer; <40% get a re-pitch. The behavioral branching and watch-segmented followup templates handle all four paths.

perfect-webinar-shortcut-funnel.rationale: Perfect Webinar Shortcut is the condensed 60-min single-belief presentation. Same reminder + close automation as a full live webinar. Stack close fires immediately post-webinar with a tightened offer window.

five-minute-perfect-webinar-funnel.rationale: 5-Minute Perfect Webinar is a short-form VSL/training replay that closes fast. Reminders and the stack-close automation apply. Post-opt-in multichannel stack extends the pre-webinar indoctrination across channels.

product-launch-funnel.rationale: Product launch funnels (Jeff Walker-style) have a pre-launch content sequence and a cart open → cart close window. Cart open/close launch sequence governs the offer window. 3 Closes master followup fires through the close. Value broadcast campaign drives the pre-launch content.
product-launch-funnel.entry_event: PLF opt-in / cart open / cart close

invisible-funnel.rationale: Invisible funnel charges after the content is delivered — the prospect only pays if they love it. SOS runs during the free content window to bond the subscriber. 3 Closes fires after the content is delivered as the 'now you decide' sequence.

summit-funnel.rationale: Summit funnels register large audiences for multi-speaker events. The webinar reminder stack fires per speaker slot. Indoctrination multichannel preframe builds AC authority before the summit. SOS fires on opt-in for summit newbies.

teleseminar-funnel.rationale: Teleseminar funnels are phone/video call-based trainings with an offer. Same reminder and post-call close automations as a webinar funnel. Stack close fires after the call.

telesummit-funnel.rationale: Telesummit is a multi-day, multi-expert phone/virtual event. Same automation pattern as summit funnel — reminder stacks per session, indoctrination preframe, SOS for new subscribers.

hotel-meeting-funnel.rationale: Hotel meeting / live event funnels need strong show-up automation. Application-homework-booking-nurture handles qualification + show-up sequence. Reminder stack fires for confirmed attendees. SOS bonds new subscribers to the host AC.

live-demo-home-party-funnel.rationale: Live demo / home party funnels drive physical or virtual in-home events. Reminder stack ensures show-ups. SOS bonds the new attendee to the AC. Post-opt-in multichannel stack extends the invite across channels.

follow-up-funnel.rationale: The follow-up funnel is the ongoing relationship engine. SOS bonds any new subscriber; the daily Seinfeld broadcast is the permanent ongoing relationship. Re-engagement winback fires for cold/disengaged subscribers. 3 Closes fires when a re-offer is made.
follow-up-funnel.entry_event: New subscriber opt-in / existing contact re-entry

cancellation-funnel.rationale: Cancellation funnel fires when a member attempts to cancel. Membership stick + retention is the primary save sequence. Re-engagement winback runs for members who went cold before cancelling. 3 Closes fires if a re-offer is made to save the cancellation.

break-even-front-end.rationale: Break-even front-end funnels are designed to cover ad costs at the front door. Every non-buyer needs a rescue — abandoned cart recovery fires immediately. SOS bonds new leads so the back end can profit.

client-acquisition.rationale: Client acquisition funnels drive high-ticket sales calls. Application-homework-booking-nurture is the primary automation — qualifies, bonds, books, shows up. Indoctrination multichannel preframe runs pre-call to build authority and reduce no-shows.

cold-traffic-article-preframe.rationale: Cold traffic article preframes warm cold audiences before the main funnel. Behavioral retargeting fires on article page visits for non-opt-ins. Indoctrination preframe sequence runs post-opt-in. SOS bonds the converted reader.
cold-traffic-article-preframe.entry_event: Article page visit / opt-in from article CTA

funnel-hub.rationale: Funnel hubs aggregate multiple funnels under one navigation. Behavioral retargeting fires for hub visitors who browse but don't opt in. SOS fires on any opt-in. AC story rotation broadcast keeps the hub audience engaged across all entry points.
funnel-hub.entry_event: Hub page visit / any hub opt-in

pop-up-ad.rationale: Pop-up ad funnels capture attention from a brief, interruptive format. SOS bonds the new subscriber fast. Indoctrination preframe fills the gap between the ad hook and the main offer. Retargeting re-fires for visitors who closed the pop-up.

pre-funnel-social-preframe.rationale: Social preframe pages warm cold social traffic before entering the main funnel. Behavioral retargeting catches social visitors who bounce. Indoctrination preframe and post-opt-in multichannel stack extend the warm-up across channels.

shadow-funnel.rationale: Shadow funnels run in parallel to a main offer, capturing leads who didn't buy. SOS runs immediately on shadow-funnel opt-in. Indoctrination preframe and post-opt-in multichannel stack provide the 'soft' warming sequence before a buy is requested again.

viral-front-end.rationale: Viral front-end funnels spread via referral mechanics. Every new subscriber (from any viral branch) fires SOS and the indoctrination sequence immediately. Post-opt-in multichannel stack extends the viral hook across Messenger and push.
